plugins.name: WorkBuddy (CodeBuddy)
plugins.description: Wraps Tencent CodeBuddy (copilot.tencent.com) as a CLIProxyAPI provider. Supports QR/OAuth login, panel-paste or uploaded API-key credentials, Claude Code system-template sanitization, hy3 max thinking, and true async streaming via host.stream.emit.
plugins.author: WslzGmzs
